title: Feature Request: Automated Project or Invoice Numbering
excerpt: Currently trying to create a custom project number (or invoice number) using multiple columns and calculated fields. One option would be to use the auto-number column, however it is currently not supported in the formula…

posts.author: DirtNastyL0w (Alex LaDouceur)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently trying to create a custom project number (or invoice number) using multiple columns and calculated fields. One option would be to use the auto-number column, however it is currently not supported in the formula builder.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DirtNastyL0w! Would the AutoID column (/app) be along the lines of what you’re looking for?

Screen Shot 2023-02-06 at 12.12.12 pm540×632 77.7 KB

Let me know and feel free to elaborate further on how you’d like to set this up!

posts.author: DirtNastyL0w (Alex LaDouceur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bianca!

Yes, it looks like something like this could work. I see that it would be an additional charge so will try to see if we have other options to meet the same end objective.
